ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicle_makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle make (e.g., Nissan, Chevrolet, Hyundai) */,
  "make_description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle make */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the vehicle make */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle make */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model (e.g., MuranoAWD, CamaroCoupe, Santa) */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle model */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., gasoline, diesel, hybrid) */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_models_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("make_id") REFERENCES vehicle_makes ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle model */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the vehicle is located */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle (e.g., new, used, certified pre-owned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealerships" (
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealership */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the dealership */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the dealership */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the dealership */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the dealership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dealership */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the vehicle in stock */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dealership */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price of the sale */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the salesperson */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES dealership_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, salesperson) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_features_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales transaction */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the transaction */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the salesperson */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES dealership_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sales_transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_management" (
  "inventory_management_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory management record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dealership */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the vehicle in stock */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "low_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Low stock threshold for the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_management_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_management_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_management_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealership_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dealership */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dealership_staff_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_images_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the vehicle (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
